description: Full reproducible MAE citation-review example using OpenAI API direct LLM classification on extracted full texts. Stops after review_prompt_fulltext.md.

fallbacks_when_unspecified.fetch.max_results: null means fetch all citing papers returned by OpenAlex
fallbacks_when_unspecified.pdfs.max_pdfs: null means attempt all open PDF URLs
fallbacks_when_unspecified.extract_text.max_pdfs: null means extract all downloaded/skipped PDFs
fallbacks_when_unspecified.llm_classify.full_text_chars: 30000 means each classification call gets at most 30000 extracted full-text characters for that paper
fallbacks_when_unspecified.llm_classify.resume: true means existing classified rows are reused if the run is restarted
fallbacks_when_unspecified.review_prompt.yes_only: true means final review evidence includes confirmed yes papers only
fallbacks_when_unspecified.review_prompt.abstract_chars: all means include full abstracts for selected papers
fallbacks_when_unspecified.review_prompt.full_text_chars: all means include full extracted text for selected yes papers
fallbacks_when_unspecified.llm_write_review: not run in this example by request
